news.title: Einride bets $38M on EV charging as it scales electric trucking
news.summary: Einride agreed to buy Flipturn for $38 million in stock.

news.title: Apple teams up with Klarna to launch a lease-to-own program for iPhones, iPads, and Macs
news.summary: The new leasing program is a big change for the hardware company, and comes as it looks to raise prices on many of its products.

news.title: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
news.summary: New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.

news.title: Tesla spins up robotaxi pilots in Orlando and Tampa ahead of Q2 earnings
news.summary: The company didn't say how many are in each city and has taken a far more cautious approach to scaling the network than CEO Elon Musk had promised.

news.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
news.summary: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

news.summary: As component and RAM shortages drive prices higher, Apple is reportedly launching an "Apple Upgrade" program for leasing new devices. news.title: Twitch will let parents stop their teens going live
news.summary: Twitch is giving parents more control over how their children are using the streaming platform, including the ability to block them from broadcasting entirely. news.title: Anthropic’s $1.5 billion book piracy settlement approved by judge
news.summary: A federal judge has signed off on Anthropic's $1.5 billion class action settlement with authors who accused the company of training its AI models on copyrighted books, as reported earlier by Reuters. news.title: Steam Deck sales are losing steam since May's price hike
news.summary: Analysis of bestseller charts shows an 80 percent dip from 2025's sales rate.

news.title: Google announces Gemini 3.6 Flash and cybersecurity AI, teases 3.5 Pro and Gemini 4
news.summary: There are new 3.6 and 3.5 models today, but Google is already training Gemini 4.

news.title: TreeSize won't renew perpetual-license support unless users subscribe
news.summary: "Current economic conditions" have shifted TreeSize's business model.

news.title: When your vehicle outlives its cloud: What happens next?
news.summary: Automakers love connected vehicles, but support isn't open-ended.

news.title: Apps targeted at US troops contain Chinese and Russian code
news.summary: More than one-eighth of apps analyzed contained foreign code.

news.title: A Sneaky Hacking Tool Targeting AI Infrastructure Is Lurking in Victims’ Blind Spots
news.summary: A new type of malware can worm deep into AI coding systems to steal data and logins—and can flip a “death switch” to destroy files and keep out real users.

news.title: The Light Flip Is the Stylish Dumb Flip Phone of Your Dreams
news.summary: A flip phone with 5G, USB-C, a headphone jack, and a removable battery? Say it ain’t so.

news.title: Nvidia Wants to Own Every Chip Inside AI Data Centers
news.summary: Nvidia’s Vera Rubin platform combines CPUs and GPUs into a single system, reflecting the company’s growing ambition to power every layer of AI infrastructure.

news.title: The Great Peptide Cash Grab Has Begun
news.summary: The FDA could decide whether to loosen rules around peptide production this week. Some telehealth players are already seeing dollar signs.

news.title: Halliday’s New Smart Glasses Skip the Camera
news.summary: Halliday’s G2 glasses can listen to and summarize your workplace meetings—with no video involved.
